string.text: Cardan needs %s to install basic equipment upgrades.
I need a set of basic tools. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me, I will be grateful. I bet I can find a way to pay you back.
Great, stalker. That's exactly what I asked for. Come back tomorrow, I think you'll like what I have in stock.
Cardan needs %s to install advanced equipment upgrades.
I could really use more tools and vodka... but the vodka is easy to find. What I need from you is more tools, better tools. Can you do this for me?
I need a set of advanced tools. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me, I will be grateful. I'll scrounge up a reward for you too.
Fantastic! Feel free to stop by any time for a drink or if you need access to the good shit.
Cardan needs %s to install expert equipment upgrades.

I could really use more tools and vodka... Well by this point, I've got a good vodka guy, and I'm looking at my tools guy. I need you to hook me up with the best tools the Zone can offer. Can you do this for me?
I need a set of expert tools. Yeah, they're hard to get, but I think you can come through for me, right? I'll make sure it's worth your time.
Amazing! Really, I'm speechless. Come by any time for a drink. And I'll pick out the best gear I get my hands on just for you.
Benefactor: Get in the Teleporter Anomaly on the Hill
Benefactor: Clear out the Mutant Lair
Benefactor: Tell Noah about the Successful Mission
Benefactor: Help Noah get a New Rifle
Benefactor: Bring Noah an Armsel Protecta
A mercenary technician in Zaton has asked me to bring him %s.
Damn, thanks. Consider yourself part of my discerning customer list. Come by later and I'll make sure you get access to the VIP stock.
A mercenary technician in Zaton has asked me to bring him %s.
Having reliable weapons is nice, but that only goes so far without sufficient upgrades. Will you find me an even better set of tools?
Having reliable weapons is nice, but that only goes so far without sufficient upgrades. Will you find me an even better set of tools?
Thank you. Consider yourself part of my silver-tier customers. Come back later for some of the stuff I keep hidden for guys like you.
A mercenary technician in Zaton has asked me to bring him %s.
Oh, fuck... You're every technician's dream! Well done indeed... gold star customers like you get my best stock.
Axel needs %s to work on medical supplies.

I'm down to sloshing vodka on rags instead of using proper antiseptic and bandages. And the stalkers here aren't getting any less careful. With the number of injuries I have to treat all the time, I'll be out of even vodka and rags soon.

There is. I've been looking all over for a %s. It should contain some tablets and ampoules I need to do work on medical supplies. I'll pay you for one of these kits if you can bring a full set back to me.
Spleen needs %s to install basic equipment upgrades.
Great, stalker. You brought exactly what I've asked. Thanks, I'll open up my special stash to you.
Spleen needs %s to install advanced equipment upgrades.
A set of advanced tools would be great for my business. I could barter for so much more if I could offer upgrades with advanced tools...
Great, stalker. Come by tomorrow after word gets out, I'll make sure you get access to some of the stuff I barter for.
Spleen needs %s to install expert equipment upgrades.
Can you even imagine the kind of trades I could set up if I had a set of expert tools? It's the last thing I need to make sure all the stalkers here that need help will get it.
Amazing work, stalker. Come back later and check out my stock. What comes around goes around, eh?
